name: Fortified
effect: Increases non-boss enemies' HP and damage by 30%

name: Tyrannical
effect: Increases boss HP and damage by 30%

name: Bursting
effect: Each mob death applies a 4s stacking party DoT (~1% party HP/stack/s)

name: Bolstering
effect: Each mob death grants surviving pack +15% HP and damage

name: Volcanic
effect: Eruption under a random character every ~10s on trash

name: Sanguine
effect: Dead mobs leave heal pools; mobs standing in them heal 5% HP/s

name: Spiteful
effect: Ghost spawns on each mob death and attacks the lowest-output character

name: Raging
effect: Mobs below 30% HP enrage, gaining +25% haste (attack faster) until death
